impact: This removes malformed confidence examples from supervisor context and adds deterministic two-strike recovery rules that steer the next worker toward one-file, py_compile-safe proposals before broader validation or domain work.
summary: Tighten PP&D supervisor syntax-recovery guidance for repeated compile failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
